name: Dicyclomine Hydrochloride And Paracetamol Tablets
about: Dicyclomine Hydrochloride and Paracetamol Tablets are a combination medication used to treat stomach and intestinal cramping. Each box contains 15 strips of 4x10 tablets. These tablets come in a physical form and are manufactured in India. The drug type of this medication falls under the category of general medicines. The dosage guidelines for this product should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. It is recommended to store these tablets in a dry and cool place to avoid degradation.

faq.a: Dicyclomine Hydrochloride and Paracetamol Tablets are used to treat stomach and intestinal cramping.

faq.a: It is recommended to store these tablets in a dry and cool place to avoid degradation.
